recommendation.summary: Culture is at 0% this week (target 15%) and professional is over-indexed at 44% — the WISP networking on Saturday did the work, but the creative input that makes you interesting in those rooms is missing. The de Young's 'About Place' Bay Area Artists show closes July 5; go this week and let it be the counter-weight.
